data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-page forms with progress saving. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a patient can save progress on an intake form, it does not explicitly confirm the implementation of multi-page functionality. The absence of concrete evidence demonstrating that the form is indeed multi-page and that progress saving is effectively implemented indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of multi-page forms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
